sourceIndicatorId: Table 22: Percentage of households reporting possession of air conditioner and air cooler for each State/UT

metadata.survey: NSS 78th Round (2020-21), Multiple Indicators Survey, MoSPI
metadata.note: Parsed from the official MoSPI XLSX. Values are the percentage of households reporting possession of at least one of the appliance. Fan ownership is not in this table; NFHS-5 (2019-21) reports roughly 9 in 10 Indian households own a fan, cited in prose as context.

title: Households with an air conditioner, urban
